/usr/bin/c++ -Wall -Wextra -O3 -march=native -flto -fno-math-errno CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/Hamiltonians/elliptictrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/Hamiltonians/rbminteractrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/Hamiltonians/repulsiveho.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/InitialStates/initialstate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/NNsampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/RBMsampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/Solvers/importancesampling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/Solvers/metropolis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/Solvers/montecarlo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/WaveFunctions/anisotropicgaussian.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/WaveFunctions/boltzmannmachine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/WaveFunctions/correlatedgaussian.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/WaveFunctions/neuralnetwork.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/WaveFunctions/nn_envelope.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/WaveFunctions/simplegaussian.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/optimizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/particle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/sampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vmc.dir/utilities.cpp.o -o vmc   -L/lib/intel64  -L/lib/intel64_win  -L/lib/win-x64  -Wl,-rpath,/lib/intel64:/lib/intel64_win:/lib/win-x64:/home/davide/GitHub/computational_physics_2_2026/FYS4411-Project-2/src/NN_VMC/P1_Teresa/libtorch/lib /home/davide/GitHub/computational_physics_2_2026/FYS4411-Project-2/src/NN_VMC/P1_Teresa/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so /home/davide/GitHub/computational_physics_2_2026/FYS4411-Project-2/src/NN_VMC/P1_Teresa/libtorch/lib/libc10.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/davide/GitHub/computational_physics_2_2026/FYS4411-Project-2/src/NN_VMC/P1_Teresa/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed /home/davide/GitHub/computational_physics_2_2026/FYS4411-Project-2/src/NN_VMC/P1_Teresa/libtorch/lib/libc10.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/davide/GitHub/computational_physics_2_2026/FYS4411-Project-2/src/NN_VMC/P1_Teresa/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed
